name_cn:
Genuine quality, high version
🌟Classic Lady D three-compartment purple lambskin
Model 0505
This Lady D combines elegant temperament with modern style.
The body is made of exquisite lambskin, decorated with enamel lettering in gold.\nComes with a detachable shoulder strap.
Elegant and practical capacity meets daily storage needs.\nAnd it feels very lightweight to carry.
A must-have for fashion trendsetters.
Perfect details rivaling the real thing, super great 5🌟 reviews
Size: 17*15*7cm
